results.description: Integration test confirms journal grows by 1 line per invocation
results.evidence:
test_effect_appends_line_and_emits_event PASSED — journal written with 'tick-abc
'. test_effect_two_invocations_grow_journal PASSED — journal contains 'a
b
' after two invocations.
Both tests assert evt.line_number matches actual line count (1, then 2). Line count recomputed from file after write (authoritative, avoids race).

results.description: Uses ModelHandlerOutput.for_effect per ONEX rules (EFFECT emits events only)
